business_details.specialties: Specialize in income planning, investment planning, tax-forward planning, health and LTC, Medicare, and real estate.
business_details.history:
Serving the Pacific Northwest Since 1998, Sound Planning Group specializes in providing Retirees and Pre-Retirees with security, consistency, and predictability in their retirement, through sound strategies proven to last a lifetime.

At Sound Planning Group, we have a 7-step process for building a financial strategy that gives you a firm foundation for pursuing your goals. We call it the R.E.T.I.R.E process, which stands for Retirement Education with a Time-tested, Independent, Rational Evaluation - something that we consider indispensable to every retiree.

representative.name: David S.
representative.bio:
David is an educator, author, and regular contributor to various news and media outlets. He is the CEO of Sound Planning Group, founder of SPG Advisors LLC and Sound Tax Planning, and a mentor to various advisory firms across the country. 

For more than a decade, David has been guiding and educating retirees as they transition into retirement. He was named the “Advisor of the Year” by the Society of National Social Security Advisors based on his knowledge of Social Security, wealth management, and retirement planning. He has led his firm to become one of the fastest-growing firms, earning SPG a ranking of no. 1453 on Inc. 5000’s list of the fastest-growing private companies in America. David’s visionary attitude also helped Sound Planning Group to be named “Best of Kirkland” for Insurance and Financial Services, 7 years running.

representative.name: Monte S.
representative.bio:
Monte Snider, President of Snider Financial Group Inc. and financial advisor began his education in 1988 as finance major at the University of Arkansas and graduated in 1992. He earned the Chartered Financial Consultant designation in 2000, and became a Life Underwriter Training Council Fellow (LUTCF). He continued his financial education at the American College taking courses about income taxation, investments, risk management, and financial planning. He graduated from MetLife's Financial Planning School in 1999. He is currently holds FINRA series 6, 63, 7, 65, 24, 53, and 3 with LPL Financial. He is also Life, Disability and Property and Casualty licensed.

Securities offered through LPL Financial, Member FINRA/SIPC. Investment advice offered through Snider Financial Group, a Registered Investment Advisor and separate entity from LPL Financial

Our clients deserve nothing less than a proactive partner who is vigilant in serving their interests. At Elite Wealth Management, we provide investment advice and cutting-edge solutions that best meet the needs of the individuals, families, and institutions whose assets we manage. By offering a full range of financial services and partners, we provide sound investment advice, implement strategic planning, and utilize the expertise of our analysts to ensure our clients always have the upper hand.

Elite Wealth Management serves a broad base of clients, including newly affluent individuals and families with a long history of wealth and complex financial needs. We are a full-service financial firm that provides comprehensive solutions and services designed to help our clients achieve their goals. We believe in the power of truth to enhance value and we aim to provide them with the peace of mind that their financial future is secure. All of our clients are put into Separately Managed Accounts at a major online brokerage. This ensures strict control and transparency over their accounts.

representative.name: Fariba R.
representative.bio:
Ms. Fariba Ronnasi, president and founder of Elite Wealth Management, Inc. is a financial consultant in Kirkland Washington who has headed the strategic management of numerous high net-worth individuals. Prior to establishing the firm in October of 2004, Fariba worked as Managing Director for the Private Wealth Division of Columbia Management Company and was responsible for expanding the Private Portfolios Group on the West Coast.

Previously, Fariba was a Business Development Manager for Citicorp in Private Banking Division. Prior to joining Citicorp, she worked as the Senior Private Banking Manager at Keycorp and established the Technology group for the Private Bank. She has 23 years of solid experience in the field of financial asset management, investment strategies, and retirement planning. Fariba received both her Bachelor's and her Master's degree from Seattle University in the field of Finance with a minor in Economics.

business_details.specialties:
WaterRock Global Asset Management, LLC. is a registered investment advisor in WA, OR, CA, AZ, & FL. Advisor may only transact business in states it is registered or exempt from registration.

Any comments or ratings are not to be considered an endorsement of the Adviser.

We specialize in investment management for gay couples, individuals who work for large companies, and business owners.
Gay couples need a team of experts who understand asset transference rules. We spend significant amounts of time learning and assembling our team.
Individuals that work for large companies like Boeing, Microsoft, Amazon, etc. Many have restricted stock grants or stock options, retirement plans (401k), and employee stock purchase plans. Many other advisors don't know or don't care to learn how to take advantage of these plans. At WaterRock we educate ourselves on your company's benefits plan.
Business owners make up the lion's share of our business. Whether you are a wealth creator through deliberate planning or by necessity, we can help. Business owners by necessity include an employee or family member(s) that take over due to the death or disability of the principle owner.
Every advisory relationship begins with a conversation. I look forward to your call.
business_details.history: I began my financial advisory practice at Merrill Lynch in 2005.  After completing the training program I moved my practice to Morgan Stanley (eventually Morgan Stanley Smith Barney).  On April 1st 2011 I joined WaterRock Global Asset Management.  In November of 2014 I acquired the founder's interest in WaterRock Global Asset Management and became the Principal and Chief Investment Officer.

business_details.specialties:
From the beginning, one of Capital Planning's guiding principles has been to deliver independent and unbiased advice to assist our clients as they navigate through significant life decisions that impact their wealth. Our clients rely on our experience and time-tested strategies to help guide them through major life events such as retirement, the sale of a business, or planning their family legacy.

Our senior advisors have an average of over 25 years of wealth management experience and have been with Capital Planning for an average of 15 years. This provides our clients with confidence in the commitment and stability of our advisory team.

We strongly believe that our structure as a fee-based registered investment advisory firm positions us to offer the best solutions to our clients. As an independently owned organization, we are not affiliated with any other financial institution. Our advisory team represents the interests of our clients through objective, independent investment and wealth planning advice.
business_details.history: Since 1983, Capital Planning has provided wealth management solutions for corporate executives, business owners, entrepreneurs, and high net worth families. Together, we can develop a wealth plan for your unique needs.

business_details.specialties:
Brein Wealth Management is a Registered Investment Advisory firm servicing the greater Seattle and East Side areas.  We specialize in Retirement Planning, Social Security Planning, College Planning, Estate Planning and Financial Analysis.  Whether you're looking to start saving for retirement and need direction on what types of investments you should choose, or are to make sure the current savings you have will carry you into retirement and pass on to your beneficiaries without them paying extra taxes, Brein Wealth Management is available to help be your guide.

At Brein Wealth Management, we take an education based approach and boast a robust platform offering everything from Life Insurance and Annuity products to Actively Managed Institutional Investment Strategies.  

Make no mistake though, Brein Wealth Management is not your traditional wire-house brokerage firm.  We take an entirely different approach and act as a Fiduciary for out clients- this means we put your interests 100% in front of our own when you work with us.  

We feel like the traditional Financial Services Industry has really let people down over the last decade or more with their dishonest sales practices, high fees that are nearly impossible to understand and lackluster performance with hard-working people's money and life savings.  Brein Wealth Management is out to change that, one relationship at a time.
business_details.history:
Brein Wealth Management has been operating in the state of Washington since the start of 2013 and was opened by President and Founder Josh Brein as a way to give people more options when it comes to saving and investing.  

Brein Wealth Management has constantly worked to stay ahead of the competition by utilizing the latest technology not only to keep organized but also to help people understand the A-Z of their financials.

Although our history is important, we always keep our eyes open for and strive for a great future with our clients!

representative.name: Josh B.
representative.bio:
Josh Brein grew up in the Seattle Area and has been working in Financial Services since 2006.  Josh has been running and independently operating Registered Investment Advisory Firms Since 2010 and prior to that worked as a Registered Representative and Investment Advisor Representative for several large international Insurance Companies and Broker Dealers.

Fee based financial planning and investment advisory services are offered by Brein Wealth Management, LLC, a Registered Investment Advisor in the State of Washington. Insurance products and services are offered through Brein Financial, LLC. Brein Wealth Management and Brein Financial are affiliated companies. Brein Wealth Management, LLC and Brein Financial, LLC are not representatives or affiliated with the VA or any Government Agency. VA accredited attorneys are not affiliated with Brein Wealth Management, LLC or Brein Financial, LLC.

annotations.title: Really takes the time to listen to your needs and develop a custom plan to address them. Highly recommend Brein Wealth Management.

business_details.specialties:
Chuck Schwab started a stock brokerage company with a simple question: isn't there a better way? That question led to the establishment of a new kind of investment firm - with a more contemporary approach to wealth management based on a set of core values and beliefs, not just profits and losses. These core beliefs have led to 40+ years of serving clients, innovating on their behalf, and developing brokerage products and financial services that put them - not us - first. 

At Schwab, we offer a wide range of wealth management services, personalized financial advising and retirement planning, and expert investment research, as well as a number of complimentary workshops covering everything from investing essentials to complex trading strategies. 

Brokerage Products: Not FDIC Insured - No Bank Guarantee - May Lose Value
business_details.history:
The Charles Schwab Corporation provides a full range of brokerage, banking and financial advisory services through its operating subsidiaries. Its broker-dealer subsidiary, Charles Schwab & Co., Inc. (member SIPC), and its affiliates offer investment services and products. Its banking subsidiary, Charles Schwab Bank (member FDIC and an Equal Housing Lender), provides deposit and lending services and products. Access to Electronic Services may be limited or unavailable during periods of peak demand, market volatility, systems upgrade, maintenance, or for other reasons. The Charles Schwab Corporation does not endorse third-party comments.

This page is designed for U.S. residents. Non-U.S. residents are subject to country-specific restrictions. Learn more about our services for non-U.S. residents.

business_details.specialties:
ICON Consulting was founded with the singular focus of helping clients understand and make informed decisions regarding their financial well being. We have a fundamental understanding and focus that the most important part of our relationship is to protect and look out for our clients' best interests.

As we cultivate relationships with our clients that last a lifetime, it is our unbiased and expert knowledge that is the key to our shared success. Gaining and retaining wealth requires education, vision, and direction, and it is extremely difficult to navigate in the financial world if you don't have someone you trust teaching you the rules.

With over 70 years of combined experience, ICON Consulting is one of the Northwest's most sought after independent, fee-based financial planning and wealth management firms. As leaders in our industry with respect to strategic consulting and independent advice, we serve our clients and their families as their trusted Personal CFO.
business_details.history:
ICON's Mission:
Serving as their trusted Personal CFO, we bring vision and direction to the lives of our clients and their families.

Our areas of expertise include, but are not limited to, the following:

1. Comprehensive Financial Planning 
2. Tax Planning & Retirement Cash Flow Analysis 
3. Investment Consulting & Wealth Management 
4. Real Estate Planning (Analysis, Appraisal, etc) 
5. Company Stock Option Analysis & Strategies 
6. Asset Protection & Insurance Planning 
7. Liability Management & Budget Planning 
8. Estate & Business Succession Planning 
9. Philanthropic & Charitable Giving Planning 
10. Intergenerational Wealth Transfer Planning 
11. Portfolio Analysis & Optimization Techniques 
12. Education Planning (529, GET, Financial Aid)

business_details.specialties:
HighTower Bellevue, formerly known as Triad offers a variety of wealth management and financial services. 

Our vision is to help our clients have a better understanding of their wealth by creating a plan of action that is in alignment with their goals and objectives.

Included in our services are personal financial planning, portfolio management, family wealth stewardship and fiduciary services. Our self-discovery process reveals your personal risk tolerance, planning time horizons, and goals. With these determined, we build a portfolio around today's economics.

We are located in the Symetra building in downtown Bellevue.
business_details.history: A fiduciary is an investment professional or financial advisor who is legally required to act solely in the interests of their clients. By law, their advice and recommendations must align with a client's specific objectives, timeframe and risk tolerance. We are fiduciaries, and must adhere to a Fiduciary Standard - the highest standard in the financial services industry. We have a legal obligation not to subordinate clients' interests to our own. We act in your best interest and must set aside personal motives and avoid conflict of interest, in favor of pursuing the best solution to your unique situation. Included in the fiduciary standard...

representative.name: Larry K.
representative.bio:
Lars Knudsen leads the team at HighTower Bellevue. He founded his RIA practice 30 years ago on the basis of his belief in wealth stewardship. This vision continues to guide his team today.

After graduating from Pacific Lutheran University with a degree in Accounting and Finance, he worked as an accountant before establishing his own financial planning business, which merged with national CPA firm Moss Adams after 14 years of independent success. He later founded Triad Wealth Stewardship, now known as HighTower Bellevue, to deliver a personalized, custom approach to financial planning and family wealth stewardship to clients. 

The term stewardship means to care and be responsible for assets or resources, and reflects the thoughtful, dedicated approach Lars and his team take to serving clients and their families. He and the team derive tremendous pride and purpose from helping clients to bring their personal beliefs, family values and wealth into balance.
